_publications._publicationTitle: Unmasking Intra-tumoral Heterogeneity and Clonal Evolution in NF1-MPNST.

_contextSnippet: The tumor purity of this sample was >95%...Area #2 shows spindled cells in a background of hemorrhage...with a tumor purity of >95%...This sample showed >95% tumor purity.
details: Tumor purity >95% achieved in all three sampled areas, with Area #1 showing spindle cell neoplasm, Area #2 showing spindled cells with hemorrhage, and Area #3 showing necrosis
